seoTitle: Bowes vs Boxwood Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bowes and Boxwood Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bowes vs Boxwood Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bowes and Boxwood Hill.
heading: Bowes vs Boxwood Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bowes, Western Australia and Boxwood Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bowes has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Boxwood Hill (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bowes or Boxwood Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bowes has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Boxwood Hill scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bowes scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Boxwood Hill scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bowes or Boxwood Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bowes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
